creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 230555
0001-net-p2p-bazarr-Update-to-1.0.2.patch

poudriere ok
runtest ok

Runs in 'production' on my multimedia setup (13.0 amd64)

Highlights:
- Fixed errors under python 3.10. Working but not yet tested enough to be officially supported.
- Added embeddedsubtitle provider to extract embedded subtitles to external .srt files. Some players work better with external subs.
- Added support for upcoming Sonarr v4.
